svg.title: Context window feeding LLM inference
svg.desc: Context window components flowing into LLM inference.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are system instructions in the context window?')
sendPrompt('What are custom instructions in the context window?')
g.text: Project-specific rules: claude.md, skills, prompts, agents

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools can be referenced in Positron Assistant?')
sendPrompt('How do user messages accumulate in the context window?')
sendPrompt('What is implicit and explicit context in Positron?')
sendPrompt('How do tool outputs accumulate in the context window?')
g.text: Terminal, file reads, search results — grow each call

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do LLM responses accumulate in the context window?')
g.text: Each reply re-enters context for the next turn

svg.text: Each new prompt carries all prior prompts and results —
the context grows larger with every turn.
